questionHtml:
What is polyploidy?

A. Having an extra set of chromosomes

B. Having an extra sex chromosome

C. Having an extra autosome

D. Having two or more nuclei

meta.title: What is polyploidy? A. Having an extra set of chromosomes B. Having an extra sex chromosome C. Having an extra autosome D. Having two or more nuclei
breadcrumbLabels: A4.1.11. Abrupt speciation in plants by hybridization and polyploidy
